description: This pipeline applies an expression to each row of a table, using column values as variables, and then exports the resulting data to a file, grouping items based on annotations, while also providing the results in a table format for further processing or output.

889e9aa7-fab7-4929-a10f-53ddbb1cd1d6.name: iji-export-table-v2
889e9aa7-fab7-4929-a10f-53ddbb1cd1d6.description:
Exports a results table to CSV/XLSX

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

17798695-3883-4be1-b589-1821e0a0ede3.name: table-apply-expression-per-row-v2
17798695-3883-4be1-b589-1821e0a0ede3.description: Applies an expression for each row. The column values are available as variables.
